Keyword-26Mar14.description:
ZW searched Google Scholar (14 Mar 2026) without restricting the publication year, using the following Boolean search string in title and abstract:

(“video” OR “observational video”) AND (“visual analysis” OR “visualization” OR “temporal visualization” OR “spatial visualization” OR “state diagram”) AND (“interaction” OR “interaction analysis” OR “action sequence”) AND (“qualitative”)

This search returned 93 results.

Keyword-26Mar18.description:
ZW searched Google Scholar (15 Mar 2026) without restricting the publication year, using the following Boolean search string in title and abstract:

Micro-level: "visualization" AND ("gestures" OR "speech" OR "transcription") AND ("qualitative" OR "interpretive")
Meso-level: "visualization" AND ("group dynamics" OR "team collaboration" OR "social networks") AND "fieldwork"
Macro-level: "visualization" AND ("organizational workflows" OR "process mapping") AND "exploratory analysis"
Methodological Focus: ("ethnogram" OR "timeline" OR "flow diagram" OR "visual elicitation") -("statistical" OR "predictive" OR "design evaluation")

All initial results (over 700 candidates), after filtering by looking at the title, abstract, and figures in the paper, were narrowed down to 44 new items.
